channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: What an irony! AMD could potentially block Intel deal by invoking agreement put in place to prevent its own sale
item.description: If Broadcom or another buyer does want to acquire Intel, they will have to negotiate a new cross-license agreement with AMD.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: Amazon's big Alexa event is nearly here - here are 4 things to expect, including Alexa's AI upgrade and a new Echo speaker
item.description: From Alexa AI to new Fire TV updates, this is what you can expect to see at Amazon's next big Alexa device event.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Why AI On-Premises Means Big Bottom-line Advantages in the Long-run
item.description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is at a pivotal moment, as more businesses realize that the best place for their AI operations might not be the cloud, but on their own premises.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Salesforce Expands AI Model Sharing with Google, Bets Big on Agentic AI
item.description: Salesforce and Google Cloud have announced a major expansion of their strategic partnership, involving the sharing of cloud and AI resources. Central to this deal is the ability for Salesforce customers to build AI agents using Google's Gemini models and deploy Salesforce on Google Cloud. The emergence of agentic AI, estimated to be worth $2 trillion, has significant implications for businesses looking to transform with AI.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: What is Firefly: everything you need to know about Adobe’s safe AI image generator
item.description: Integrated into Creative Cloud, Firefly can be used to generate images, edit photos, change art styles and more. Here’s why you should be using it.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Apple Shareholders Reject Proposal to Scrub Diversity Initiatives
item.description: Apple shareholders reject proposal to pressure company into joining President Trump's push against diversity, equity and inclusion initiatives.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: La contratación de CIO pega el estirón: Cómo conseguir un puesto de alto nivel en tecnología en 2025
item.description: Los primeros resultados de la contratación de líderes de TI en 2025 sugieren un mercado sólido. Para algunas empresas de contratación, el crecimiento del empleo para puestos ejecutivos tecnológicos está en su punto álgido.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Google Rolls Out Free Gemini Code Assist for Developers
item.description: Google launches a free version of Gemini Code Assist, a tool for code completion, generation, and chat, to help individual developers improve their productivity.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Everything new on Apple TV+ in March 2025: Severance season 2 finale, Dope Thief, The Studio, and more
item.description: From the end of Severance season 2 to Mythic Quest's first spin-off show, here's what's coming to Apple TV+ in March.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Here are crypto’s biggest heists after Bybit’s $1.5 billion hack
item.description: Cryptocurrency exchange Bybit said last week hackers had stolen digital tokens worth around $1.5 billion, in what researchers called the biggest crypto heist of all time.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Top Apple exec concedes he had doubts about app store fees imposed on alternative payment options
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — Longtime Apple executive Phil Schiller on Monday conceded he initially opposed fees that the iPhone maker charges for in app-transactions processed outside its own payment system because he feared violating a court-ordered mandate designed to create more competition.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Elizabeth Holmes fails to overturn her Theranos fraud conviction
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Elizabeth Holmes, the disgraced founder of Theranos, will remain in prison after losing a bid Monday to overturn her fraud conviction, with a federal appeals court saying she hadn’t proved there were legal missteps during her trial for defrauding investors with false claims of w
item.dc:creator: OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Apple announces $500 billion investment in US amid tariff threats that could affect the iPhone
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Apple announced Monday that it plans to invest more than $500 billion in the United States over the next four years, including plans to hire 20,000 people and build a new server factory in Texas.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: SEC ends investigation into Robinhood's crypto arm
item.description: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has closed its investigation into the cryptocurrency arm of Robinhood without taking action against the online brokerage, the company announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Massive airship could shake up cargo transport
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says this enormous airship revolutionizes cargo transport by flying to remote areas.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Musk: Federal workers who gave 'good responses' to new policy deserve promotion consideration
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk said he’s encouraged by the “good responses” he’s received so far to an email asking federal employees to detail their recent work efforts and suggested the employees who sent them be considered for promotion. “A large number of good responses have been received already.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: Can you spot a credit card skimmer? What to look for
item.description: Before putting your card into a reader, the FBI says there are some easy and effective ways to protect your information.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, NewsNation

item.title: Brazil Supreme Court justice orders Rumble suspension nationwide for alleged non-compliance
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — A Brazilian Supreme Court justice on Friday ordered the suspension of video-sharing platform Rumble in the South American nation for allegedly refusing to comply with court orders.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Apple drops encryption feature for UK users after government reportedly demanded backdoor access
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple said Friday it will stop offering an advanced data security option for British users after the government reportedly demanded that the company provide backdoor access for any data those users have stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Optimization is a biproduct of Army’s network consolidation
item.description: Leo Garciga, the Army’s CIO, said the Unified Network Optimization initiative is helping the service cut costs and duplicative applications. The post Optimization is a biproduct of Army’s network consolidation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: GenAI is my copilot? Developers weigh pains and gains
item.description: Developers are quicker than most to embrace generative AI tools as part of their workflow. That can mean enhanced productivity and easing cognitive burdens, but it also means learning new technologies while they’re still being built.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Everything we know about Apple’s C1 5G modem in iPhone 16e
item.description: There’s a lot to like about Apple’s newest $599 iPhone 16e, but one of the more interesting features in the device is the Apple-designed 5G modem. Apple has spent at least seven years developing the chip, but gave it just a few short seconds of time when it announced the smartphone this week.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: VMware by Broadcom: Product, service and support news
item.description: News of Broadcom’s plans to acquire VMware triggered concerns among customers, partners, and industry watchers, many of whom recalled Broadcom’s track record with prior high-profile acquisitions, including network switching vendor Brocade in 2016 for almost $6 billion, software firm CA Technologies
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Intro to Elixir: A fresh take on functional programming
item.description: Elixir is one of the most interesting stories in the world of programming languages right now. Built on the Erlang ecosystem, Elixir offers a fresh take on functional programming and new ways of thinking about concurrency and fault tolerance.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: DeepSeek accused of sharing user data with TikTok owner ByteDance
item.description: "We confirmed DeepSeek communicating with ByteDance," a South Korean data protection regulator told Yonhap News Agency.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: SpaceX makes history after launching rocket from Florida and landing booster in Bahamas
item.description: For the first time ever, SpaceX launched a rocket into space from Florida and landed the booster the Bahamas, allowing for future polar-orbit spaceflight missions.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
